chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-156 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 15.04.2026 Mr.Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for the State ****** None has appeared on behalf of the applicants. However, surety Tarique Ali son of Madad is present and has placed on record a photostat copy of the certified Order dated 07.02.2026, wherein it appears that the applicants/accused have entered into a compromise with the complainant, which has been accepted by the trial Court, and the applicants/accused have been acquitted under Section 345 Cr.P.C. In such circumstances, the instant bail application has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
